demo.title: hermesone-setup.ts

setup: Requires Node.js 18+ (uses built-in fetch) and a desktop session for the GUI installer
One-shot install: `npm install hermesone` (postinstall detects OS/arch, downloads, and launches the installer)
Reusable CLI: `npm install -g hermesone`, then `hermesone install | update | version | help`
CI / headless / Docker: set `HERMESONE_SKIP_INSTALL=1` to skip the postinstall, then call `install()` where a GUI session exists
